title: A Hymn to Inanna: Queen of Heaven
description: Enheduanna's hymn to Inanna — the first named author in human history praises the most powerful goddess.
introduction: Enheduanna's hymn to Inanna — the first named author in human history praises the most powerful goddess.

translation.text: Lady of all powers, in whom light appears, radiant one, beloved of Heaven and Earth.
